skrypt-story-id.helpText: Auto-generated story slug used internally for organization.
skrypt-story-id.label: Skrypt Story Id

wordcount.helpText: Auto-calculated word count of all scenes/manuscript content.
wordcount.label: Word count

skrypt-id.helpText: Internal skrypt-id for identification of skrypt types.
skrypt-id.label: Skrypt Id

skrypt-type.helpText: Internal Skrypt-Type for organization and ViewTemplates. This never needs to be set when using the wizards.
skrypt-type.label: Skrypt Type

wordcount-target.helpText: Set a target wordcount. This will display a progress indicator on the story dashboard.
wordcount-target.label: Word count target/goal
